style: hand-coloured cartographic plate, muted ink, period-appropriate

images.prompt: Snowy Antioch with bearded Julian haranguing curiales; hand-coloured plate.
Hierapolis steppe-fringe, two columns mustering; hand-coloured plate.
Callinicum Euphrates port with shallow transports drawn by oxen; hand-coloured plate.
Ctesiphon with arched palace and burning Roman fleet on Tigris bank; hand-coloured plate.
Samarra dusk encampment, lit imperial tent, mourning officers; hand-coloured plate.
